reviews.comment: I recently visited Coffee Island in NSP and had a great experience. I tried their Cappuccino and Chicken Sandwich, and both were really good. The coffee had a rich flavor and the sandwich was fresh and tasty. The ambience of the café is calm and comfortable, which makes it a nice place to sit and relax. I also met Manju ma’am, and she spoke very politely and treated me very well. The staff was friendly and the service was quick. Overall, my experience was very good and the place is clean and well maintained. I would definitely recommend this café to anyone who loves good coffee and a nice atmosphere.
